title: Fractal Enchantment Glint
description: This replaces the glint texture with a 1920x1920 image of a fractal, edited to look nicer.
body:
Replaces the enchantment glint texture with a custom fractal, which was edited after creation for visual appeal. 

It looks better with something that zooms out the enchantment glint texture on items, such as Enchantment Outline _(I have no association with the creator(s) of Enchantment Outline)_. I do not know how to produce this effect, so it is not included.

Generated at [fractaleverywhere.com](https://fractaleverywhere.com/). I have no association with the creator of the website.
